title: Scarlet Is Lost
description: Pages 6–10 focus on scarlet is lost, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Scarlet as rebecca's bond with the one-legged toy soldier is revealed through her memories of Scarlet, while the Colosseum pulls her back into the fight.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I'm sorry, of course you are. It's been two whole days...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Rebecca... Can I leave you alone, just for a bit?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: You need to promise me you won't move from this spot...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I'll go get us something to eat...

dialogue.speaker: Toy Soldier
dialogue.text: ...she told me to give you this.

dialogue.speaker: Rebecca
dialogue.text: Sorry... you've been hungry, and waiting....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: I'll go get us some- thing to eat...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: I saw some blood on the stairs...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: He's gotta be hiding around here. Find him!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: She was once a great person...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: Did you know that a new King has come to this land?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: And that new King... He's going after all those great people from the past.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: He's capture- ing all of them.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: And you, with your mother's distinguished blood running through your veins...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: He'll also want to capture you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: I couldn't protect your mother, but...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: Even if it costs me my own life, I will protect you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: Until the day when you can truly be happy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: I will stand by you until that day!!

dialogue.speaker: Scarlet
dialogue.text: You couldn't protect my mommy. I hate you, soldier- San!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #41
dialogue.text: You mustn't! The new King's friends...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: are lying in wait in the town and in your house!!

summary: Scarlet Is Lost focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as rebecca's bond with the one-legged toy soldier is revealed through her memories of Scarlet, while the Colosseum pulls her back into the fight.
